test_CalculateUserShare_SingleUser().details: Due to FIX-001 (50% approximation), single user may get up to 2x rewards      This test verifies share is calculated and > 0, not exact amount

test_Claim_ProportionalToVotingPower().details: Bob locks 2x Alice, so Bob should get ~2x rewards

test_Claim_Success().details: Due to veQS approximation (FIX-001), we add extra balance to distributor      to ensure sufficient funds for any calculated reward amount

test_MultipleEpochs_AccumulateRewards().details: Fixed: warp uses relative time increments, not absolute timestamps

test_CalculateUserShare_MultipleUsers().notice: Test equal stakers get equal shares

test_Claim_Success().notice: Test claim succeeds and transfers rewards

test_MultipleEpochs_AccumulateRewards().notice: Test rewards accumulate across multiple epochs
